compensation.title: Compensation Adjustment Letter
compensation.subtitle: Compensation Adjustment Letter
compensation.body: We are pleased to inform you of the following compensation adjustment.
compensation.name: Name
compensation.bodyText:
This adjustment will take effect from the effective date above and will be reflected in the payroll from the pay date of the month in which the effective date falls.
Please contact the HR team if you have any questions regarding this letter.
